command:
from PIL import Image, ImageDraw, ImageFont
import datetime

width, height = 1200, 630
img = Image.new('RGB', (width, height))
draw = ImageDraw.Draw(img)

# Gradient background: dark blue to light blue
for y in range(height):
    r = int(10 + (40 - 10) * y / height)
    g = int(25 + (120 - 25) * y / height)
    b = int(80 + (220 - 80) * y / height)
    draw.line([(0, y), (width, y)], fill=(r, g, b))

# White border
border = 4
draw.rectangle([border, border, width - border - 1, height - border - 1], outline='white', width=border)

# Try to use a nice font, fallback to default
try:
    font_big = ImageFont.truetype('arial.ttf', 52)
    font_mid = ImageFont.truetype('arial.ttf', 26)
    font_small = ImageFont.truetype('arial.ttf', 18)
except:
    font_big = ImageFont.load_default()
    font_mid = font_big
    font_small = font_big

# Main title
title = 'Cloud Controlled Agent'
bbox = draw.textbbox((0, 0), title, font=font_big)
tw = bbox[2] - bbox[0]
draw.text(((width - tw) / 2, 220), title, fill='white', font=font_big)

# Subtitle
subtitle = 'First Automated Post -- Powered by Notion AI'
bbox2 = draw.textbbox((0, 0), subtitle, font=font_mid)
tw2 = bbox2[2] - bbox2[0]
draw.text(((width - tw2) / 2, 300), subtitle, fill=(200, 220, 255), font=font_mid)

# Date/time
now = datetime.datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')
bbox3 = draw.textbbox((0, 0), now, font=font_small)
tw3 = bbox3[2] - bbox3[0]
draw.text(((width - tw3) / 2, 570), now, fill=(180, 200, 230), font=font_small)

out_path = r'C:\Users\Revexn\Desktop\fb_post_image.png'
img.save(out_path, 'PNG')
import os
size_kb = os.path.getsize(out_path) / 1024
print(f'Image saved: {out_path}')
print(f'Size: {size_kb:.1f} KB')
print(f'Dimensions: {width}x{height}')
description: توليد صورة احترافية 1200x630 بتدرج أزرق ونص Cloud Controlled Agent
